# discord_application_emoji (Resource)

Manages an emoji owned by a Discord application (bot).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# image_data_uri is a write-only base64 data URI; load it from a local file.
data "discord_local_file" "logo" {
  path = "logo.png"
}

resource "discord_application_emoji" "logo" {
  application_id = "123456789012345678"
  name           = "company_logo"
  image_data_uri = data.discord_local_file.logo.data_uri
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the application the emoji belongs to.
- `image_data_uri` (String) Base64 image data URI for the emoji. Write-only: applied at creation and not refreshed from the API.
- `name` (String) Emoji name.

### Optional

- `roles` (Set of String) Snowflake IDs of the roles allowed to use this emoji. Only settable on creation; changing it forces replacement.

### Read-Only

- `animated` (Boolean) Whether the emoji is animated.
- `available` (Boolean) Whether the emoji is available for use.
- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the emoji.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the emoji is managed by an integration (read-only).
